mapper.sql: id, user_id, type, title, content, read_status, read_time, related_id, related_type, sender_id, pushed_status, push_time, priority, action_url, extra_data, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET read_status = #{readStatus}, read_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE notification SET read_status = #{readStatus}, read_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE notification SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( user_id, type, title, content, read_status, read_time, related_id, related_type, sender_id, pushed_status, push_time, priority, action_url, extra_data, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{readStatus}, #{readTime}, #{relatedId}, #{relatedType}, #{senderId}, #{pushedStatus}, #{pushTime}, #{priority}, #{actionUrl}, #{extraData}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM notification WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = 0 AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notification ( user_id, type, title, content, read_status, read_time, related_id, related_type, sender_id, pushed_status, push_time, priority, action_url, extra_data, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.type}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.readStatus}, #{item.readTime}, #{item.relatedId}, #{item.relatedType}, #{item.senderId}, #{item.pushedStatus}, #{item.pushTime}, #{item.priority}, #{item.actionUrl}, #{item.extraData}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type}
